title: Evangelion 20 SKU Final Scenes
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0/SKU Final Scenes Post by Bagheera » Tue Nov 29, 2011 6:45 am Saw this mentioned elsewhere, so I figured I'd pass it along. Do we have a thread out there discussing this?

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Nov 29, 2011 7:26 am Yes: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/9187/Rebuild-specific-References-Homages-Etc/ About the 3rd page that image is posted along with the Ultraman Nexus one: http://www.tesuji.org/images/eva2.0_finale.jpg

[]: Post by Bagheera » Tue Nov 29, 2011 8:27 am Ah, old news then. Might as well lock/delete the thread in that case, as you like.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 29, 2011 8:38 am I think Enokido himself suggested the "nod", since he worked a little with the others on 2.xx. (He suggested Shinji saving Rei, at least, but I can't recall if he referenced Utena at all). Threads here if you're interested in discussing/reading up on it: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/10604/20-Complete-Records-Collection-Information/
